message:
Fix runtime memory management, while loops, and dict methods

Agent 1: Runtime memory management
- Added defer statements for list/dict/tuple variables (statements.zig)
- Fixed refcounting in mutation operations (pylist.zig, pytuple.zig, dict.zig)
- Removed incorrect incref() from append/insert/set operations
- Fixed dict.keys/values/items refcounting semantics

Agent 2: While loop support
- Fixed detectReassignments() to traverse control structures recursively
- Added type annotations for mutable variables (var count: i64 = 0)
- While loops now compile and execute correctly

Agent 3: Dict method routing
- Added dict.get(), dict.items(), dict.update() routing
- Fixed expression statement handling for methods with error unions
- All 11 list methods + 5 dict methods now properly routed

Results:
- Tests: 30/76 passing (39%, up from 21%)
- +14 tests passing
- Memory management fixed for all PyObject types
- All control flow (if/for/while) working
